title: Wan Pisu (One Piece)
description: Wan Pisu (One Piece) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to have their own One Piece journey!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wan_Pisu/BH_Wan_Pisu_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wan_Pisu/BH_Wan_Pisu_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wan_Pisu/BH_Wan_Pisu_overview.webp)
---

**Wan Pisu (One Piece)** is a fantasy Modpack based on the anime/manga "Wan Pisu (One Piece)". Set sail on your own ship, for adventures, mystery and the Grand Line! Choose your path as you explore islands, uncover legendary treasures, master powerful abilities, and encounter characters from the series. With a progression system, unique races, combat styles and oceans teeming with danger, your life always hangs in the balance...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/wanpisu)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wanpisu)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wan_Pisu/BH_Wan_Pisu_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Ship Sailing** - From the smallest to the largest sail your own ship across these seas!
- [✔️] **One Piece** - Enjoy a world based after your favourite manga/anime, from characters to ships to weapons and so much more...
- [✔️] **Dungeons** - Why only search dungeons on land? Enjoy a vast array of unique sea based dungeons packed to the brim with adventure!
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems, shaders too!

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Wan_Pisu/BH_Wan_Pisu_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
